manuscript_profile.title: Dracula
manuscript_profile.genre: Adult Gothic Horror / Epistolary Supernatural Thriller
manuscript_profile.target_audience: Adult readers of Gothic horror, epistolary supernatural thriller, Victorian literature, and documentary terror

txt: Adult Gothic Horror / Epistolary Supernatural Thriller
Gothic Horror / Epistolary Supernatural Thriller / Victorian Literature
One of the strongest genre premises in Gothic fiction: ancient predation enters modern bureaucratic, medical, legal, and technological England.
It should not be evaluated as a simple vampire adventure; its true architecture is documentary terror.
Author retains ownership of manuscript content

optional_public_strings: Form can be plot: the dossier is not packaging; it is the engine.
Middle-act procedural drag after the central threat is understood.
source_only_strings: Dracula is a benchmark long-form Gothic novel because its terror is not carried by plot alone, but by document architecture.
Genre fame must not inflate every score: pacing drag still needs to be named.
